title: Sour Flaky Filipino Pastry Empanadas
description: Tangy and flaky empanadas made with creamy beurre-monte, vegetable shortening, and a citrus‑tamarind filling, perfect for a keto snack.
instructions: In a bowl combine almond flour and salt.
Whisk in melted vegetable shortening, beurre-monte, egg, and water until a dough forms, then knead until smooth.
Wrap the dough in plastic wrap and chill for 20 minutes.
Sauté onion and garlic until translucent.
Add diced carrots, bell pepper, and cabbage, cooking until slightly softened.
Stir in tamarind paste and lime juice, season with a pinch of salt, and cook for 2 minutes.
Remove the filling from heat and let it cool slightly.
Divide the chilled dough into 12 equal pieces and roll each into a circle.
Place a spoonful of filling on each circle, fold into a triangle, and seal the edges by pressing with a fork.
Brush the tops of the empanadas with beaten egg.
Bake for 18 to 20 minutes until golden and flaky.
